keywords.name: Purge
keywords.description: Removed from combat and your deck permanently.

keywords.name: Exhaustive
keywords.description: This card Exhausts after N uses.

keywords.name: Persist
keywords.description: This card returns to your hand the first N times it is played each turn.

keywords.name: Refund
keywords.description: When energy is spent on this card, up to N of that energy is refunded.
